name: Lovage
long_description:
Lovage helps barbers and stylists fill empty appointment slots and get more clients.

Beauty professionals frequently have gaps in their schedules due to cancellations, no-shows, and uneven demand. Lovage turns that unused availability into booked appointments.

We integrate with booking systems to detect open slots, generate on-brand content, and distribute it to channels like Instagram where clients can instantly book.

The result is more bookings, higher utilization, and increased revenue without relying on ads or manual marketing.
one_liner: Automatically fill empty appointment slots for beauty professionals
